claims.name: Cross-persona steering P chosen at |c|=0.05 sadist probe direction
claims.statement: Under the sadist persona system prompt, contrastive steering along the default-persona Gemma-3-27B probe (ridge, L32) applied at layer 25 at |c| = 0.05 (fraction of the L25 mean activation norm) makes Gemma-3-27B pick the positively-steered task at P(steered task chosen) = 0.945.

claims.name: Cross-persona steering P chosen at |c|=0.03 sadist random direction
